tiktok.caption: Checking your portfolio daily is quietly costing you $47,000. DALBAR proved it. Here's the fix 👇

youtube_short.title: Why Checking Your Portfolio Daily Costs $47K
title_alternatives: Stop Checking Your Portfolio (It's Costing You $47,000)
The Daily Habit Quietly Destroying Your Investment Returns
youtube_short.description:
You open your investment app every morning thinking you're being responsible — but DALBAR's 30-year study shows the average investor earns just 2.9% per year vs 7.5% for a simple index fund. That 4.6% behavior gap turns $100K into $238K instead of $840K over 30 years — a $602K difference. Loss aversion makes you panic-sell on red days and miss the rebound every time. The fix: check quarterly, automate contributions, and let compounding do its thing. #investing #personalfinance #money #wealthbuilding #stockmarket

Follow for a new money trap exposed every day.

hook_line: Checking your portfolio daily is costing you $47,000
